summary: Fresh Imaging/re-image of the original image172647 search range after c01 tracked successfully once but then failed pODMR auto-align and standalone retrack with low counts.
scientific_rationale: The same c01 seed changed from a successful standalone TrackCenter (41.984 kcps) to pODMR in-run AlignNV failure (3.420 kcps) and immediate standalone retrack failure (3.278 kcps). This is a count/tracking/imaging-frame freshness problem, not resonance evidence. Re-image the original 10 x 10 um region at the original two z planes to recover current bright NV candidates before continuing alignment screening.
expected_evidence: candidate ranking from current image axes before TrackCenter
success_criteria: Bridge Imaging scan completes with saved image covering x=112..122 um, y=110..120 um, z=115 and 116 um
At least one current bright local peak can be ranked for TrackCenter
stop_conditions: No bright local peaks after explicit-axis export; then decide on a different region
